update.releaseNotes:
v5.2.0 - Changelog
New --- - Add a new option to the `Settings` page to set a date to stop the app at. - Add new options to the `Debug Settings` page to enable the `Remote Log Viewer`. This allows users to view the logs from their browser on separate devices in real-time. Requires both devices to be on the same Wi-Fi network to work. - The drawer now has the app icon in it as well as a footer with a pressable link to the GitHub repo. - Add a checkbox to the `Skill Plan Settings` pages to filter out the unselected skills. - Add logic to determine whether an in-game button is disabled or not. - Add `Team Carrot` as an option in the `Training Event Settings` page for Unity Cup Team Selection. - Add a new option in the `Debug Settings` page to start a OCR detection test for the trainee's name from the aptitude dialog. - Add missing options in the `Debug Settings` page for the `Main Screen` and `Training Screen` tests. - Add edge case handling of artificial boost of side-effect gains for Guts training. - Add more selection reasons at the end of training analysis. - Log trainings that needed corrections at the end of training analysis with asterisks. - Add more edge case handling for the training stat gain corrections.
Adjustments --- - Update the game data up to Admire Vega 2026-03-04. - Update `Automation Library` version to 2.5.0. - Adjust the starting Discord message that is sent to display the link to the `Remote Log Viewer` as clickable when it is enabled. - Curb the output of loading log messages. - Adjust the conditions of when the smart racing plan is checked so it races more often. - Set the smart racing parameters to new default values so it races more often. - Image asset cleanup and use them as components instead. - Shorten the scroll distance when scrolling down as skills are being scanned when purchasing skills. - Log the leftover skill points after skill plan execution. - Log all skills scanned when purchasing skills. - Always enforce Wit training on the final turn 75.
Fixed --- - Fix bugs related to scrolling lists. - Fix rare bug that causes infinite loops due to the app running too fast. - Fix regression where running style was not being reset anymore after Junior Year. - Fix bug where the app is unable to send the final Discord message when the run ends due to it finishing too fast. - Fix several edge cases involving the Race Preparation screen. - Fix bug where SQLite settings were not syncing. - Fix bug where the app goes too fast and miss clicking on the Skills button at Career End. - Fix using the wrong mapping to check for side-effect stat gains during training analysis. - Fix require cycle involving the `SkillPlanSettings.tsx` and `BotStateContext.tsx`.
